experience.title: Teacher
bullets: Maintain observations, attendance, and in-kind records

experience.title: Home Visitor
bullets: Weekly in-home instruction and family goal setting

experience.title: Youth Counselor/Family Support Specialist
bullets: Recruitment, needs assessments, referrals, interagency coordination, behavior interventions, transition support

skills_and_achievements: [Family engagement and home visiting; classroom instruction (ages 3–5); IEP/IFSP collaboration; parent training, conferences, and transitions to kindergarten; records/compliance (Title 22, Head Start Performance Standards); recruitment/enrollment; case management and referrals (health, mental health, nutrition); safety/first aid; MIS data entry; culturally responsive communication; multitasking and deadline management.
